title: Fix Admin Dashboard redirect after login in production

requirements.text: Fix the admin login flow so that after successful authentication (via email/password, biometric, or Internet Identity), the user is reliably redirected to the Admin Dashboard page in production — not shown a 'Go to Admin Setup or Return to Home' fallback screen. The redirect logic must work consistently in both draft and production environments.

quotes: when i log in on open draft it will goes Admin Dashboard but when i log in on live app web pages not opening Admin Dashboard its showing go to admin setup or retun to home

acceptanceCriteria: After successful admin login in production, the user is navigated directly to the Admin Dashboard page.
The 'Go to Admin Setup or Return to Home' fallback is not shown to already-authenticated admin users.
The redirect behavior is identical between draft and production environments.
AdminGuard correctly recognizes the authenticated admin principal/session in production and does not redirect them to setup.
The admin login page clears any stale auth state before checking admin existence to avoid race conditions.

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the AdminGuard component to ensure it does not prematurely evaluate admin status before the actor and identity are fully initialized in production. If the identity or actor is not yet ready, the guard must show a loading state rather than falling through to the 'admin setup' screen.

quotes: its showing go to admin setup or retun to home what is problem

acceptanceCriteria: AdminGuard displays a loading indicator while actor or identity is being initialized.
AdminGuard does not render the 'admin setup' or 'access denied' UI until the identity and admin status check are fully resolved.
In production, authenticated admin users are granted access to the Admin Dashboard without seeing the setup screen.

requirements.text: Fix the AdminLoginPage post-login navigation to use a reliable programmatic redirect (e.g., router.navigate) to the admin dashboard route after all authentication methods succeed, ensuring the navigation fires after actor/identity state is fully settled — not before async state updates complete.

quotes: when i log in on open draft it will goes Admin Dashboard but when i log in on live app web pages not opening Admin Dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: After login succeeds via any method (email/password, biometric, Internet Identity), navigation to Admin Dashboard fires reliably in production.
Navigation does not occur before the authentication state and actor are ready.
No stale query cache causes the admin check to return a false negative immediately after login.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change the backend admin authorization logic.
The fix must not break the existing draft environment behavior.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or pages.
Modifying customer-facing login or portal pages.
